creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: tcberner
Date: Sat Feb 10 08:03:33 UTC 2018
New revision: 461362
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/461362

Log:
  Switch C compiler used to compile GHC to base Clang.

  This removes build dependency on gcc and runtime dependency on gcc's runtime libraries.

  Big thanks to Gleb for working on this.

  PR:		225185
  Submitted by:	Gleb Popov <6yearold@gmail.com>
  Exp-run by:	antoine
  Reviewed by:	pgj
  Differential Revision:	https://reviews.freebsd.org/D12043
